archetype: 7 (Electric & Neon) combined with 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) — tailored for Automotive HUD

numbers_and_data.style: tabular-nums, precise, technical, used for pricing and telemetry

visual_enhancers.metallic_accents: Use pure white 1px inner borders to simulate reflective chrome edges. Soft ambient blooms.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento 'Control Room' grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4) with tight gap-4 for the parts dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 generously to allow HUD elements to breathe.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-lg (subtle, technical edges, not overly pill-shaped).
spacing_and_layout.mobile_first: Ensure max-w-md mx-auto or full-width mobile container framing.

components_strategy.cards: Flat dark metallic backgrounds with 1px border-white/10. On hover, border shifts to neon blue (border-[#00F0FF]/50) and gains a subtle drop-shadow glow.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary: Solid neon blue (bg-[#00F0FF] text-black) with hover glow. Secondary: Transparent with neon blue 1px border and text.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn heavily customized: bg-black/50, border-white/10, focus:border-[#00F0FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00F0FF].
components_strategy.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (technical, duotone or thin styles).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Border colors transition to neon blue, text glows.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Framer Motion fade and slide-up (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0).
motion_and_interaction.data_loading: Use the scanline effect or glowing pulse instead of standard spinners.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text against glass surfaces uses text-shadow or sufficiently dark backgrounds for APCA/WCAG AA.
accessibility.focus_states: High visibility focus rings using the baby blue neon color.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid based on role (e.g. data-testid='diagnose-button').

media_and_images.description: Metal HUD Background to be used behind the main dashboard or as a subtle app background pattern.
Futuristic car engine hologram used as the visual identity for the AI Mechanic chat.
Glowing baby blue waveform for the Voice Recording feature in AI Mechanic.
Close up of an engine in a car, use as product image in parts search.
Close up of a car's exhaust system, use as product image in parts search.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first web app mimicking a React Native/Expo UI (since stack is Tailwind/React).
Use Framer Motion for screen transitions.
Implement the specific UI layout for the Dashboard (Bento Grid), Chat Screen (AI multi-turn Q&A), Parts Search (list + images + price), and Profile.
Ensure the scanline gradient and neon glows are strictly applied to surfaces without looking muddy.
